title: althaea parviflora
intro: Althaea parviflora is a perennial herb belonging to the mallow family, native to Australia and New South Wales. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of Althaea parviflora include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome. Althaea parviflora can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or topical ointment, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
